MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT SFDH ASSOCIATES LP'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT:
SUSTAINED with 10 days leave to amend as to the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th and 7th Causes of Action;
OVERRULED as to the 5th, 6th and 8th Causes of Action;
OVERRULED as to punitive damages. Defendant cannot demur to a prayer for punitive damages. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/PHA/DS) Reporter: Bob Balian, CSR #5220
